text: 82.4g of carbs. and that is basically the whole nutrition story.

the upsides first: strong traditional identity. tests whether raw honey scores above processed honey via context. less processed than commercial honey. should separate it meaningfully in misc. very familiar use case. practical relevance.

the drawbacks next: still mostly concentrated sugar. this remains the main downside. overall payoff is still limited. better than processed honey, not magically elite. easy to overuse. practical downside.
B tier. Best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
